details: repo_structure: reports/board/ directory was missing (created during this run to satisfy governance contract)

Additionally, scripts/run_molt_workflow.py and scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py reference moltbot patterns. These are code/config hits outside reports/audit or docs documentation-only paths.
